is.t: The building is located in a bustling urban area[Sellers market]. The vicinity has a limited number of available properties, leading to high demand and lower supply.
The building is located in a bustling urban area[Sellers market]. The vicinity has a limited number of available properties, leading to high demand and lower supply.
The building is situated in a semi-urban area[Stable market]. The vicinity has a moderate number of properties available, balancing supply and demand.
The building is located in a rural area[Buyers Market]. There are several properties available in the vicinity, leading to high supply and relatively low demand.
Class of Land as per Title Deed
The land comprising 3.45 ares in Survey No. 254 of Kuthiathode village is owned by Sanjay Babu, acquired through Deed No. 234/2024, registered at Kuthiathode SRO.
Class of Land as per LTR
Class of Land as per Possession
Nadavazhi and Property of Shivan Pillai
Right of access available as per Title deed/Site Conditions

c.f: IF(M127="No","The property does not have right of access as per the title deed. ","")

is.t: The plot has Pancahyath Road access
* North side is demarcated with foundation, East side is demarcated with foundation, South side is demarcated with foundation, West side is demarcated with foundation.
Level of plot relative to road

c.f: CONCATENATE("The level of the plot is ",M161)

is.t: land is a land locked plot
Electric lines and power supply available..?
VI. Any Serious threats to the land

c.f: CONCATENATE("is located within a slum area, ")
CONCATENATE("is located in a communal area, ")

is.t: Pollutions from Industry or Heavy Traffic..?
is located in a polluted area by Heavy traffic and Industires.

c.f: CONCATENATE("is located nearby a chemical hazard area, ")

is.t: Heritage Valued area by Survey of India

The property is within 30 meters of the railway boundary. Therefore, any new construction requires an NOC from the railway authority. Please note that if the property is acquired by the railway for future development, the building's value will not be considered for compensation or solatium.
A portion of the building extends onto the neighboring property.
A portion of the neighboring building encroaches to this property.
No. of apartments in each floor
Total No. of Floor including basement

c.f: CONCATENATE("Based on market price search in OLX, 99aceres , inquiries and the valuer's databook, the sale price of similar land in the area ranges from ₹",AA304," to ₹",AA303," lakh.")

is.t: Has solar heating and panel systems,
Sale comparison method [Market Approach] is adopted, Since the property is Non-Income fetching but marketable
Rental income method [Income Approach] is adopted, Since the property is Income fetching and marketable

c.f: IF(A317="","",CONCATENATE(" * A Lumpsum value is considered for ",A317))

is.t: * The building is currently serving as Residential-A1 type occupancy, which has a coverage of 35 and an FSI of 0.35 , both of which are within the limits set by the Kerala building rules-2019. * North side is demarcated with foundation, East side is demarcated with foundation, South side is demarcated with foundation, West side is demarcated with foundation. * The plot has 3m wide Panchayath Road access. * The building has setback violation with an actual Front Side setback of 2.7m falling short of the minimum required limit of 3m. * Railway line located 48m away from the property.
* Overall, the property is moderately marketable considering the aspects that needs attention.
* Overall, the property has low marketabilit considering the aspects discussed.
